name: book-of-git
description: Git workflow skills for repository hygiene, workspace cleanup, and conflict resolution.

interface.longDescription: Book of Git packages guarded Git workflow skills for repository hygiene, local worktree cleanup, branch cleanup, main branch refresh tasks, and remote-base conflict resolution.
defaultPrompt: Use $git-workspace-cleanup to prune local worktrees and branches back to main.
Use $git-workspace-cleanup to keep only the main worktree and update main.
Use $git-resolve-conflicts to resolve a branch or PR conflict against its remote base.
